title: hedysarum minimum
intro: Hedysarum minimum, also known as Dwarf Sweet Clover or Bitter Clover, is a perennial plant belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant's roots and leaves are used in herbal medicine, which has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic properties, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hedysarum minimum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Hedysarum minimum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions.
